reviews.comment:
No te venden agua caliente. Pretenden que tengas 5 pesos en monedas. No se en que país viven, las monedas no se consiguen hace más de 3 años.

(Translated by Google)
They don't sell you hot water. They expect you to have 5 pesos in coins. I don't know what country they live in; coins haven't been available for over 3 years.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3bG9xQjFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar donde reponer energía luego de un largo viaje. Baños limpios,  aire puro a la orilla del río y obvio..cargar combustible Ypf,  el mejor!!!

(Translated by Google)
A place to recharge after a long trip. Clean restrooms, fresh air by the river, and of course... fill up at YPF, the best!

reviews.comment:
Me quede a dormir alli en hotel del aca. Excelente como siempre salvo una empleada q m atendió q vaya saber xq trato d q no m quede y hasta insulto. Ya lo deje asentado en libro d quejas del 22 abril 17

(Translated by Google)
I stayed overnight at a hotel there. Excellent as always, except for one employee who served me. I wonder why she tried to make me feel uneasy and even insulted me. I've already noted this in my complaints book for April 22, 2017.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnc0pmbnR3RRAB
